title.zh: 範例介入可改善代謝健康
title.en: The sample intervention improves metabolic health

one_liner.zh: 在 Q1、2016 年後文獻中，效益方向不一致且確定性偏低。
one_liner.en: Across Q1, post-2016 evidence the effect direction is inconsistent and certainty is low.

disclaimer.zh: 本報告為實證文獻評析，非個別醫療建議。
disclaimer.en: This report is an evidence appraisal, not individual medical advice.

question.zh: 在過重成人中，介入相較標準飲食是否降低體重？
question.en: In overweight adults, does the intervention reduce body weight vs standard diet?

search_strategy.query: ("sample metabolic diet") AND ("body weight") AND PUBYEAR > 2015

included_studies.title: Effect of a metabolic diet on body weight: a randomized trial
Weight outcomes of structured meal-replacement programs

dissent.zh: OpenEvidence 對長期維持效果持保留態度。
dissent.en: OpenEvidence is cautious about long-term maintenance of the effect.

pro.zh: 六項 Q1、2016 年後研究（n=742）顯示短期體重下降，但異質性高、偏誤風險中度，GRADE 確定性為低。
pro.en: Six Q1 post-2016 studies (n=742) show short-term weight loss, but heterogeneity is high and risk of bias moderate; GRADE certainty is low.

lay.zh: 短期內可能幫助減重，但證據品質有限，長期效果尚不確定。
lay.en: It may help with short-term weight loss, but the evidence quality is limited and long-term effects are unclear.

formatted.zh: Lee J, Chen W. Effect of a metabolic diet on body weight: a randomized trial. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2021.
formatted.en: Lee J, Chen W. Effect of a metabolic diet on body weight: a randomized trial. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol. 2021.

formatted.zh: Garcia M. Weight outcomes of structured meal-replacement programs. Diabetes Care. 2019.
formatted.en: Garcia M. Weight outcomes of structured meal-replacement programs. Diabetes Care. 2019.
